title: step-group parent delete scaffold
scope: delete practice_step_groups parent only, keeping recipe nodes alive and unlinked
truth_source: actual code + worker docs + approved TASK-110~145
constraints: add deletePracticeStepGroup helper only; no adminView/menuView/sessionView/CSS changes; no node/menu delete in this slice; no full summary rebuild
phase4_sequence: npm run build -> npm run lint -> @self-reviewer -> npx tsc --noEmit
success_criteria: step-group row can be deleted as a parent unit, local bundle removes step_group_nodes/tacit_items/tacit_media for that group, summary decrements only stepGroupCount/tacitItemCount/tacitMediaCount and removes the group row, totalNodes and node-type counts remain unchanged
